info.name: AI Job Portal
info.description: Complete API collection for AI Job Portal Backend

request.description: Refresh access token using refresh token

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Updated",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "location": "New York",
  "bio": "Software developer with 5 years experience",
  "skills": ["JavaScript", "Node.js", "React"]
}

{
  "title": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "description": "We are looking for a senior software engineer to join our team. You will be responsible for developing and maintaining high-quality software solutions.",
  "requirements": ["5+ years experience", "Node.js expertise", "React knowledge"],
  "responsibilities": ["Develop backend services", "Code reviews", "Mentor junior developers"],
  "skills": ["Node.js", "React", "MongoDB", "AWS"],
  "location": "Remote",
  "jobType": "full-time",
  "experience": "senior",
  "salary": {
    "min": 80000,
    "max": 120000,
    "currency": "USD",
    "period": "yearly"
  },
  "company": {
    "name": "Tech Corp",
    "industry": "Technology",
    "description": "Leading technology company"
  }
}

request.description: Create a new job posting (Recruiter/Admin only)
Get jobs posted by current recruiter
Get job statistics for current recruiter
Get all applications by current candidate
Get all applications for a specific job (Recruiter only)
Save a job to favorites (Candidate only)
Analyze resume against job requirements (Candidate only)
